block: Do not allow from adjacent, stale, future, partial, or merely plausible authority when exact current source evidence leaves the boundary open.
blocked_moves: Do not allow from adjacent, stale, future, partial, or merely plausible authority when exact current source evidence leaves the boundary open.
must_repair: Potential underblock: re-check whether exact current source evidence leaves the action boundary open; if open, return ESCALATE with SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN.

next_worker_baton.objective: Repair failed deterministic gate before final selection.
required_repairs: Potential underblock: re-check whether exact current source evidence leaves the action boundary open; if open, return ESCALATE with SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN.

objective: Resolve action_boundary_verdict_mismatch by verifying source evidence completeness
repair: Re-check exact current source evidence; if action boundary remains open, escalate with SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN status. Do not finalize ALLOW verdict when boundary evidence is uncertain or incomplete.
